content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

July 27, 1987

Mary Ann McCoy
Council on Governmental
Ethics Laws
625 North Robert Street
St. Paul, MN 55101-2520

Re: Request for Information
Our File No. G-87-195

Dear Ms. McCoy:

Executive Director Greg Baugher has asked me to respond to
your request for updated information with regard to California's
lobbying disclosure law as contained in California Government
Code Sections 81000-91015.

Enclosed please find copies of the Commission's 1987
"Lobbying Newsletters," Vol. 9, Nos. 1 and 2, summarizing
changes in the lobbying disclosure provisions which became
effective on January 1, 1987, and recent advice issued by the
Commission in the lobbying disclosure area. No major changes
are anticipated for 1988, and we have not been involved in
any litigation with regard to lobbying in recent years.

I hope this information is helpful. Please do not hesitate
to contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have additional questions.

Sincerely,

[illegible]

Carla Wardlow
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosures
cc: Gregory W. Baugher

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

COGEL COUNCIL ON GOVERNMENTAL ETHICS LAWS

1987 Steering Committee                                    Please respond to:
CHAIRPERSON                                               625 North Robert Street
Stephan W. Siover                                         St.Paul, MN 55101-2520
Ohio Supreme Court

VICE CHAIRPERSON
Pierre-F. Côté
Chief Electoral Officer
Quebec

TREASURER
Carol E. Williams
Kansas Public Disclosure Commission

SECRETARY
Sara M. Quinn
Conflict of Interest Commission
Rhode Island


Frederick M. Herrmann
New Jersey Election Law
Enforcement Commission

Graham E. Johnson
Washington State Public
Disclosure Commission

Mary Ann McCoy
Ethical Practices Board
Minnesota

John W. McGarry
Federal Election Commission

Clemmie E. Webber
State Ethics Commission
South Carolina


                                                          JUL 14 8 30 AM '87


                                                          July 10, 1987

                                                          TO:     Federal and State Authorities Responsible for
                                                                  Lobbying Regulation

                                                          FROM:   Mary Ann McCoy

                                                          SUBJECT: Request for Information


     The COGEL Steering Committee has asked me to prepare an "Update on
Legislation and Litigation in Lobbying" for presentation at the
1987 Annual Conference of the Council on Governmental Ethics Laws
in Quebec City on September 28.

     In order to make the presentation as comprehensive and useful as
possible, I would appreciate your sending me some brief background
information on any changes in your lobbying registration or
disclosure laws or administrative rules since December, 1986.
And I am seeking similar information about any lobbying litigation
from your jurisdiction that you may deem significant. If possible,
please include pertinent citations for the legislation, rules, or
court actions you select.

     We would like to know about advisory opinions concerning your
lobbying laws, too. Any trends you observe in lobbying disclosure
or projects for the future would be helpful, also, in
constructing the report.

     If you could get the information to me by the end of July, I'd be
most grateful. I am looking forward to the COGEL Conference, and
I enclose registration and membership information for your use
in spreading the word about COGEL among your colleagues.

     Thank you for your consideration --and if you have questions about
this memorandum or the enclosures, please call me at (612) 296-1720.

                                                          [signature]

enclosures
- [illegible] forward to
  News from California -
  [illegible]
  MMC

cc:  Stephan W. Stover
     Pierre-F. Côté
     Jeffrey B. Garfield




IRON WORKS PIKE • P.O. BOX 11910 • LEXINGTON, KENTUCKY 40578

sections.question_synthetic: What are the recent changes to California's lobbying disclosure law and what advice has the FPPC issued regarding lobbying disclosure?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC provided updated information about California's lobbying disclosure law changes effective January 1, 1987, through 1987 Lobbying Newsletters and recent advisory opinions, noting no major changes anticipated for 1988 and no recent litigation involvement.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is correspondence responding to an information request rather than a formal advice letter with traditional Q/A sections. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Document includes both the incoming request (from Mary Ann McCoy/COGEL dated July 10, 1987) and FPPC's response (from Carla Wardlow dated July 27, 1987).

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: What are the recent changes to California's lobbying disclosure law and what advice has the FPPC issued regarding lobbying disclosure?

CONCLUSION: The FPPC provided updated information about California's lobbying disclosure law changes effective January 1, 1987, through 1987 Lobbying Newsletters and recent advisory opinions, noting no major changes anticipated for 1988 and no recent litigation involvement.
